$comment: MCP servers exposed to the chat console's headless claude runs. Passed via `claude --mcp-config` (non-strict, so any default MCP servers are still available). Launches the backend tool registry (viewer/backend/src/tools.ts) over stdio. Command is resolved from the chat run's cwd = repo root; `node <repo-local tsx cli> <server.ts>` avoids a network `npx` fetch.

planner-tools.description: Backend tool registry (file processing, etc.) exposed to the chat agent. Same tools the frontend calls over /api/tools.
